name: coderunner
description: A secure local sandbox MCP server that executes LLM-generated code using Apple's native container technology on macOS. Includes two bundled SKILL.md files (image-crop-rotate, pdf-text-replace) with Python helper scripts. Primarily an MCP server with skill examples.

status_cleared.reason: SM cleanup: only full_pipeline pass is real pass. Needs re-verification.
